sales.title: Revolt of the Heraclii. Solidus

Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 40256 — GRATIAN, A.D. 367-383. AV Solidus (4.45 gms), Trier Mint, ca. A.D. 376-377. NGC MS, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5. Edge Marks, Brushed.
RIC-39(d); Depeyrot-45/2. Obverse: Pearl-diademed, draped, and cuiras
sales.description:
GRATIAN, A.D. 367-383. AV Solidus (4.45 gms), Trier Mint, ca. A.D. 376-377. NGC MS, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5. Edge Marks, Brushed.
RIC-39(d); Depeyrot-45/2. Obverse: Pearl-diademed, draped, and cuirassed bust right; Reverse: Gratian and Valentinian seated facing on double throne, holding globus between them; behind and between them, Victory standing with outspread wings; palm frond below; TROBT. Perfectly struck on a round flan and lacking virtually any evidence of actual wear. Faint cleaning ...
